response.justification: Bogdan has a strong 15+ year software engineering foundation with TypeScript, cloud (AWS CDK), and staff-level experience including mentoring and technical leadership. His current role at re:cinq involves MCP server development and agentic workflow infrastructure, which aligns with the role's forward-deployed AI focus. However, Python is entirely absent from his skills and resume despite being a primary required language; there is no demonstrated experience with RAG architectures, vector databases, or LLM evaluation pipelines; and his AI solution delivery experience appears concentrated in the last ~13 months rather than the required 8 years. He would be a stronger fit if the GenAI depth can be validated in a screen.
strengths: Hands-on MCP server and agentic workflow infrastructure experience at current role, directly matching a key technology in the job spec
Proven staff-level engineering with cross-stack depth (TypeScript, Node.js, AWS CDK, microservices) and a history of technical mentorship through workshops and internal tooling
Long track record of shipping production systems across diverse domains (data integration, geo-data platforms, direct mail automation) demonstrating adaptability and engineering maturity
concerns: Python is not listed anywhere in skills or job history — a primary required language for AI/ML work in this role
No evidence of RAG architectures, vector databases, embedding pipelines, or LLM evaluation/observability frameworks in any past role
The required '8+ years developing AI-driven solutions' is not met; substantive AI/GenAI work appears limited to the current position started April 2025

key_factors.factor: No RAG or vector DB experience
